concept: Generative Pages - AI-Powered App Creation in Power Apps
description: Advanced generative pages feature in model-driven Power Apps that uses AI to create React-based UI from natural language descriptions and image references.

key_capabilities.description: Upload a screenshot or mockup as inspiration; Gen Pages recreates the styling and layout
key_capabilities.example: Canvas app screenshot used to generate matching React-based model-driven page

key_capabilities.description: Describe changes in plain English; app agent implements them
examples: Replace search by date with a date range
Make search by category a drop-down
Add an option to reset filters
Change the theme to dark mode

key_capabilities.description: Charts can act as interactive filters for the data
key_capabilities.example: Column chart showing ideas per year - clicking a year filters the gallery

key_capabilities.description: Bar width proportional to data values, sorted by volume
key_capabilities.example: Top 5 categories with bar width = number of ideas in each category

key_capabilities.description: Modern forms that slide/fly out from edges for data entry
key_capabilities.example: New idea form flies out from top when button clicked

key_capabilities.description: Built-in light/dark mode toggle with modern icons
key_capabilities.implementation: App agent adds toggle button in top-right corner

key_capabilities.description: One-click export of filtered/viewed data to Excel

data_tables_used.purpose: Tracks user votes per idea (one vote per user per idea)
Stores comments/commands on ideas with history

app_agent_workflow: Add tables to give context (ideas, categories, vote, command)
Attach reference image for UI inspiration
Describe desired page in natural language
Iterate with additional natural language commands
Undo any changes that don't match requirements
Publish to make available in model-driven app
limitations: Feature is in preview (as of video date)
Complex multi-table relationships may require regeneration
Requires Dataverse backend (not available for SharePoint/etc)

key_quotes.quote: This entire page, all this functionality I was able to build in a matter of minutes by simply describing what I need in natural language to the app agent.
key_quotes.significance: Core value proposition of Generative Pages

key_quotes.quote: Gen pages starts building out the reactbased page for me in the model driven power app. It has the context of my underlying tables.
key_quotes.significance: Explains the React-based architecture and Dataverse integration

key_quotes.quote: If any of the changes that the app agent makes is not in alignment with what you described, you can always undo that step.

technical_details.interaction_model: Natural language to AI app agent
technical_details.visual_styling: AI-generated based on reference images + descriptions

use_cases: Converting canvas app designs to model-driven apps
